## Summary

## Type of change

<!-- Mark what applies with an “x”. -->

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation / chore
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)

## Checklist

<!-- Adjust items if not relevant to your change. -->

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and [CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes.
- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes.
- [ ] `npm run format:check` passes (or I ran `npm run format`).
- [ ] Tests added or updated where appropriate (`npm test`).
- [ ] I have not committed secrets, API keys, or `.env` files.
